episodes.title: Nemotron 3 Super: open-source agentic AI — Apr 16
episodes.summary: Today, we cover NVIDIA's open-source Nemotron 3 Super model, Google's new Chrome 'Skills' for AI workflows, and OpenAI's acquisition of Hiro Finance. We also examine companies like Allbirds pivoting to AI and new research in optical computing and LLM reasoning.

episodes.title: OpenAI's Math AI: Solves Erdős problem in hours — Apr 15
episodes.summary: OpenAI's latest model reportedly solves a longstanding mathematics problem, signaling a new era for AI in science. Meanwhile, Meta deploys a new inference scaling system called SOLARIS, boosting ad revenue by nearly 0.7%. In hardware, China's Dishan Technology reports a 2nm AI chip design breakthrough.

episodes.title: Cybersecurity AI: OpenAI vs. Anthropic's new arms race — Apr 15
episodes.summary: OpenAI and Anthropic are escalating competition with new AI models specialized for cybersecurity, drawing reactions from top banks. This comes as the 2026 Stanford AI Index confirms rapid model improvement and rising costs, and new agentic tools from Google and Anthropic signal a shift toward automated, domain-specific AI.
